text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Hey! Who are you rooting for today?

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Duh! Ogurin, of course! You go, girl!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Up until now, I've been here to watch you run.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: But next time...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: The cheering is nonstop wherever you go.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
She's known as the "Star Umamusume who forged
a new era," and people really seem to believe it.
choice_data_list:
Which must mean her strength is nothing to
scoff at either.

Which must mean her strength is nothing to
scoff at either.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I know...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
That's exactly why my body is burning with the
desire to run!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Are you headed for the paddock?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Do you like rice balls?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Nothing beats Tome's onigiri when you're
nervous. I've got about ten in my waiting room, if
you're interested...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Thanks, but I'm okay.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Oh. Okay.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...I've made it this far thanks to the support of
everyone around me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Like my mom who first got me started and all the
folks who took care of me back in Kasamatsu...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: And everyone who is cheering for me now.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
So I can't let them down out there. I want to get
stronger.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Let's both give it our all.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You've got it!
